questionHtml: Outline the measurements which would need to be taken to determine the activity of the beta-galactosidase at different pH values.
markschemeHtml:
a. test samples for the concentration/amount of products/glucose/fructose/substrate/lactose ✔ Accept use Benedict/Fehling to see change in amount of reducing sugar

b. take samples of the reaction mixture at regular/timed intervals ✔ Must indicate that samples are taken at timed intervals

c. repeated measurements «at the different pH values» ✔

d. measure independent/controlled/standardised/variables / temperature ✔

meta.title: Outline the measurements which would need to be taken to determine the activity of the beta-galactosidase at different pH values.
breadcrumbLabels: C1.1.8. Effects of temperature, pH and substrate concentration on the rate of enzyme activity
